# opnsense_haproxy_mapfile (Data Source)

Reads an existing HAProxy map file on OPNsense by UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) Map file content as newline-separated key/value pairs.
- `description` (String) Description of the HAProxy map file.
- `name` (String) Name of the HAProxy map file.
- `type` (String) Map match type.
